message:
feat(storage): add attachment pipeline with WebP conversion

Complete attachment handling for archive writes:
- store_attachment(): converts images to WebP via `image` crate,
  stores at attachments/{sha1[:2]}/{sha1}.webp
- EmbedPolicy (Auto/Inline/File): controls inline vs file storage
  - Auto: inline if WebP size <= inline_image_max_bytes (default 64KiB)
  - Inline: always base64-encode into metadata
  - File: always store as file reference
- Manifest at attachments/_manifests/{sha1}.json with dimensions,
  sizes, and paths
- JSONL audit log at attachments/_audit/{sha1}.log
- Optional original file preservation (keep_original_images config)
- process_attachments(): batch process attachment file paths
- process_markdown_images(): find ![alt](path) in markdown body and
  replace with data URIs or archive paths (skips URLs/data URIs)
- 9 new attachment tests (29 total), all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
